summary: Frontend-only testing (iteration 7) of new features on /app/catalog: click-to-edit page dialogs, custom pages CRUD, IVA (priceLabel/vatRate) controls, image crop dialog. All 13 assertions passed via a single Playwright flow.

issues: A11y warning in console: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for {DialogContent}'. Radix requires a DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) for accessibility. Repeated on every dialog open. Non-blocking but should be fixed.

action_items: (Optional) Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to PageEditDialog and ImageCropDialog to silence Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: CatalogCreate.jsx is ~1610 lines — consider splitting PageEditDialog and CatalogPage/ProductCard into their own files for maintainability (>700-line threshold).
Missing DialogDescription in PageEditDialog and ImageCropDialog (Radix a11y warning).

In addCustomPage, the new custom-page key is appended to pageOrder unconditionally — if user has re-ordered pageOrder previously it still works, but note that saving with a stale customPages array (that references a non-existent id) will be silently ignored in render (customMap.get returns undefined). Consider a cleanup pass on load.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 feature groups verified: (1) Click-to-edit: clicked all 8 preview pages — cover/index/about/contact/custom opened the correct dialog (dlg-*-title testids present); content pages (indices 3,4,5) correctly did NOT open a dialog. (2) Custom page: add-custom-page appended a page-order item AND immediately opened dlg-custom-title/dlg-custom-description; edit-custom-{id} reopens dialog with preserved title; remove-custom-{id} present. (3) IVA: select-price-label 'IVA inclusa' -> 'IVA inclusa' visible in preview; '+ IVA' -> input-vat-rate appears, default 22 renders '+ IVA 22%', changing to 10 renders '+ IVA 10%'. (4) Crop: uploaded an about image, opened about dialog by clicking preview, hovered image showed crop overlay button (svg.lucide-crop), clicking it opened ImageCropDialog with apply-crop button visible (screenshot confirmed). Full crop apply flow not fully E2E-verified (per request note). Live preview updates confirmed for cover title. No JS console errors — only Radix a11y warnings about DialogDescription.
